protocol_notes: User states they are currently taking MOTS-C and interested in trying 5-Amino-1MQ. Mentioned having a doctor who can prescribe peptides. Corrected original post about 5-Amino-1MQ mechanism, stating it is for non-diet-related obesity. Noted that injections have higher absorption (close to 100%) versus oral (17-70%) depending on gut health.
